label: F-Commerce clothing seller
description: Common FAQ coverage for clothing sellers on Facebook Page + Messenger commerce: delivery, payment, returns, sizing, fabric, custom orders, and order status. Each entry is created as a draft so the KB Engineer can tune phrasing and pricing for the specific seller before publishing.

entries.title: Delivery charge — Dhaka and outside Dhaka
entries.answer: Inside Dhaka city delivery charge is BDT 80. Outside Dhaka delivery charge is BDT 130. Please update with the seller's real charges before publishing.

entries.title: Delivery time after order placement
entries.answer: Inside Dhaka delivery usually takes 1–2 working days. Outside Dhaka delivery usually takes 2–4 working days. Friday and public holidays may add one day.

entries.title: Cash on delivery availability
entries.answer: Yes, cash on delivery is available across Bangladesh. Please confirm your full delivery address and phone number before we dispatch the order.

entries.title: Accepted payment methods
entries.answer: We accept Cash on Delivery, bKash, Nagad, and bank transfer. Please share the bKash / Nagad transaction ID after sending the advance.

entries.title: Advance payment for orders outside Dhaka
entries.answer: For orders outside Dhaka or for custom-made items, a partial advance is required to confirm the order. The advance amount is non-refundable if the customer cancels after dispatch.

entries.title: Return and exchange policy
entries.answer: Exchanges are allowed within 3 days of delivery if the product is damaged or the wrong item was delivered. The customer must keep the product unworn and in the original packaging. Please share photos of the issue when raising the exchange request.

entries.title: Size chart and fit guidance
entries.answer: Please refer to the size chart in the product album. If you are between two sizes, we usually recommend the larger size for a comfortable fit. Share your bust / waist / hip measurements in inches if you'd like a tailored recommendation.

entries.title: Fabric and material information
entries.answer: The fabric is described in the product post. Please ask for fabric details by mentioning the product code so we can share the exact material and weight.

entries.title: Color and stock availability
entries.answer: Available colors are listed in the post. If a color is sold out, we can add you to the restock list and notify you when the next batch arrives.

entries.title: Live photos or video of the product
entries.answer: Yes, we can share live photos or a short video of the product. Please share the product code from the album and give us a few minutes to capture it.

entries.title: Wash and care instructions
entries.answer: We recommend gentle hand wash in cold water and dry in shade to keep the colour. Avoid harsh detergents and bleach. Iron on low to medium heat depending on the fabric.

entries.title: Custom orders and tailoring
entries.answer: Custom orders and tailoring requests are accepted with a partial advance and 7–10 working days lead time. Please share the measurements and desired customization in writing so we can confirm feasibility.

entries.title: Bulk and wholesale orders
entries.answer: Bulk and wholesale orders are welcome. Please share the quantity, item codes, and delivery location so we can prepare a quote with bulk pricing and lead time.

entries.title: Tracking an existing order
entries.answer: Please share your order ID or the phone number used during checkout so we can check the current status with the courier. We will get back with the tracking update shortly.

entries.title: Cancelling an order
entries.answer: Orders can be cancelled before dispatch by sharing the order ID. Once the order is handed over to the courier, cancellation may not be possible, but the parcel can be refused on delivery instead.

entries.title: Damaged item on arrival
entries.answer: We're sorry to hear that. Please share clear photos of the damaged item and the parcel within 24 hours of delivery so we can arrange a replacement or refund as per our exchange policy.

entries.title: Received the wrong item
entries.answer: Sorry for the mix-up. Please share photos of the item you received along with your order ID. We will arrange a pickup and ship the correct item at no extra delivery charge.

entries.title: Business hours and reply window
entries.answer: Our team is available 10 AM – 9 PM (Bangladesh time) every day except Friday afternoon. Messages received outside these hours are answered first thing in the morning.

entries.title: Pre-order and restock requests
entries.answer: If an item is out of stock, you can pre-book by sharing your preferred size and colour. We will notify you once the next stock arrives, usually within 1–2 weeks.

entries.title: Festival and special offers
entries.answer: We run special offers during Eid, Pohela Boishakh, and end-of-season sales. Follow our Facebook page or subscribe on our WhatsApp number to receive offer announcements first.
